    ConsoleRunner.displayRoutes(List<VictimIncident> incidents)

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    DispatchDecision
    DispatchEngine.evaluateBestDispatch(VictimIncident incident, Set<Hospital> hospitals, RoutingEngine routingEngine, List<Triangle> triangles)
    Evaluates all available hospitals to find the optimal dispatch destination for an incident.
    Method parameters in pgl.app.algo with type arguments of type VictimIncident
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static HospitalStats
    AnalyticsEngine.computeHospitalStats(Hospital hospital, List<VictimIncident> incidents)
    Computes comprehensive operational statistics for a given hospital based on assigned incidents.
    static int
    AnalyticsEngine.getIncidentCountForHospital(Hospital hospital, List<VictimIncident> incidents)
    Counts the total number of incidents assigned to a specific hospital.
    static int
    AnalyticsEngine.getTriangleLoadImbalance(Triangle t, List<VictimIncident> incidents)
    Evaluates the workload distribution disparity among the three hospitals forming a Delaunay triangle.

    Creates a secure audit trail log message for tracking purposes.

    Generates a detailed GDPR compliance report from the decision made by the dispatch engine.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    MapManager.addIncident(VictimIncident incident)
    Adds an incident point to the map, snaps it to the nearest road network intersection if available, and updates the map view.

    Computes the optimal road path from a specific incident location to its closest hospital site.
